last_action: Implemented Initial Payment flow, Pro-rata billing, and enhanced Admin Dashboard with Lease Pagination and better UX.
summary: Phase 13: Initial Payments & Pro-rata System. Developed a robust flow for collecting and recording security deposits and advance rent. Implemented automatic pro-rata rent calculation for the first month based on actual calendar days. Integrated advance rent as a credit for the final month stay during move-out settlement. Fixed legacy data compatibility issues (AttributeError) in the settlement process. Enhanced Admin Dashboard with pagination for Leases, immediate visual feedback for approvals, and optimized Settings layout by moving Move-in Fees configuration to the top.
next_steps: Verify pro-rata calculation across various month lengths (28, 30, 31 days).
Monitor the automatic advance rent credit application in real move-out scenarios.
Consider adding a 'Download Receipt' feature for manual initial payments recorded by Admin.
